languages.title: Ururimi
languages.subtitle: Hitamwo ururimi rukoreshwa muri porogarama yose.

phone.label: Nimero ya telefone
phone.searchCountry: Rondera igihugu, kode, canke intango yo guhamagara
phone.tooShort: Iyi nimero ya telefone ni ngufi cane.
phone.tooLong: Iyi nimero ya telefone ni ndende cane.
phone.invalid: Injira inomero ya telefone ibereye y'igihugu wahisemwo.

auth.onboardingTagline: Umugenzi w’umutekano w’umuntu ku giti ciwe mu bihe biri hagati y’aho “ndakomeye” n’aho “ndakeneye gufashwa.”
auth.createSubtitle: Hitamwo uburyo bwo kwinjira kugira ngo ukinge igicapo cawe c'umutekano.
auth.signInFailedMessage: Ntitwashoboye kurangiza kwinjira. Suzuma uko uhuye maze wongere ugerageze.
auth.googleUnavailableMessage: Gukoresha ikiganiro c’iterambere ry’intara. Native Google Sign-In ikora mu kwubaka kw'iterambere.
auth.northStarSubtitle: Pair ubu canke ubandanye wongereko mu nyuma.
auth.northStarBody: Igikoresho co kwambara VL01 gishobora gutuma habaho umutekano ukoresheje amapompi n’ibimenyetso vy’ugukanda birebire.
auth.meetCapybearSubtitle: Umugenzi wawe w’umutekano w’umugwaneza ku ikarita no mu guhamagara.
auth.capybearBody: Capybear ishobora gufasha mu buryo bwo muhira, uburyo bwo kurera, uburyo bw’ivyihutirwa, guhamagara kugira ngo urebwe, no gufasha mw’ijwi.

permissions.locationSubtitle: Ikoreshwa ku ikarita, uturere tw'akaga, gushika ata nkomanzi, na SOS ivyerekeye.
permissions.locationBody: VeryLoving asaba aho hantu kugira ngo abacungera abana bashobore gutahura aho imfashanyo yoshobora gukenerwa. Ushobora guhindura ivyo mu nyuma mu Mitunganyirize.
permissions.notificationsBody: Dukoresha gusa amatangazo ku bijanye n’umutekano, ivyihutirwa, n’ivyibutsa ushoboza.
permissions.locationRationaleMessage: VeryLoving ikoresha aho uri ku ikarita y'umutekano, uturere tw'akaga, gusangira vyihuse, na SOS ivyerekeye. Ushobora guhindura ivyo mu nyuma mu Mitunganyirize.
permissions.notificationsRationaleMessage: VeryLoving yohereza ivyibutsa vyo kwinjira, ivyihutirwa, n'ivy'umutekano ushoboza. Ntidukoresha amatangazo ku kwamamaza.
permissions.microphoneRationaleTitle: Mikoro itanga ubushobozi bwo guhamagara mu mutekano
permissions.microphoneRationaleMessage: VeryLoving ikoresha mikoro yawe gusa iyo utanguye AI guhamagara umugenzi canke guhamagara umutekano.
permissions.bluetoothRationaleMessage: VeryLoving ikoresha Bluetooth gufatanya n'amabuye y'agaciro NorthStar, gusoma uko ubufatanye buri, no gutuma umutekano uva ku vyo kwambara.
permissions.cameraRationaleMessage: VeryLoving ikoresha kamera gusa iyo uhisemwo gufata ifoto y’ibanga canke gusangira ishusho y’umutekano.

tutorial.sharedBody: VeryLoving igumya iyo nzira iboneka mu Miterere no ku rubuga.
tutorial.chooseVoiceSubtitle: Hitamwo ijwi ry’umugenzi wumva ritekanye kuruta ibindi vyose kwumva.
tutorial.homeSubtitle: Gukurikirana mu gacerere kugira ngo umuntu agire umutekano ku musi ku musi.
tutorial.emergencySubtitle: Imirongo itanu ishobora gushika ku SOS n’imburi z’abacungera.
tutorial.excuseSubtitle: Rema imvo nziza yo kuva mu bintu bitari vyiza.
tutorial.safetyCallSubtitle: Tangira guhamagara umugenzi mu gihe nyaco igihe ukeneye gufashwa.
tutorial.practiceSubtitle: Gerageza imigenderanire y’umutekano mu kwerekanwa kw’umuvuduko muto.

jewelry.pairSubtitle: Ugumye amabuye y’agaciro hafi igihe uriko urakora scanner.
jewelry.noDevices: Nta bikoresho NorthStar biri hafi vyabonetse.
jewelry.scanStartFailed: Bluetooth gupima ntivyashoboye gutangura. Ndagusavye wongere ugerageze.
jewelry.scanFailed: Ntitwaronse amabuye y’agaciro hafi. Suzuma Bluetooth, ugumize NorthStar hafi, hanyuma wongere ugerageze.
jewelry.scanAccessFailed: Bluetooth gupima ntivyashoboye gutangura. Suzuma Bluetooth access hanyuma wongere ugerageze.
jewelry.permissionDenied: Ugushika ku gikoresho kiri hafi birazimye. Kwemerera Bluetooth gushika mu Mitunganyirize, hanyuma wongere ugerageze.
jewelry.connectTimeout: NorthStar vyatwaye igihe kirekire cane kugira ngo bihuzwe. Uyishire hafi maze wongere ugerageze.
jewelry.connectFailed: Ntitwashoboye kwifatanya na NorthStar. Suzuma ko ishaje kandi iri hafi, hanyuma wongere ugerageze.
jewelry.emptyMessage: Guma NorthStar charged kandi hafi y'iyi telefone, hanyuma wongere uyi scanner.
jewelry.searchingMessage: Uriko urarondera NorthStar ibikoresho biri hafi...

home.subtitle: Umugenzi w'umutekano
home.readyBody: Ijwi, ikarata, amabuye y’agaciro, n’abarinzi biri kure y’uruzitiro rumwe.

map.title: ikarata y'umutekano
map.previewSubtitle: Expo Go ivyerekanwa; Mapbox ihindura mu kwubaka kw'iterambere.
map.updateFailed: Ntitwashoboye guhindura aho uri. Ndagusavye wongere ugerageze.
map.notRequested: Ugushika ku kibanza ntivyasabwe. Ushobora kuyifungura mu nyuma ukoresheje Amategeko.
map.permissionOff: Ugushika ku kibanza birazimye. Bishoboze mu Mitunganyirize kugira ngo ikarita y’umutekano ibe hagati kuri wewe.
map.timeout: Aho uri hariko haratwara igihe kirekire kuruta uko wari witeze. Niwimukire ahantu hari ikimenyetso gitomoye maze wongere ugerageze.
map.savedEmptyMessage: Ibibanza wizigiye ubika bizokwerekanwa hano kugira ngo ushobore kubironka ningoga.
map.geofenceEntered: You entered the %{radius}m saved-place safety zone.
map.geofenceExited: You left the %{radius}m saved-place safety zone.

safetyCall.emptyMessage: Tangira guhamagara canke wandike ubutumwa iyo witeguye.

history.clearMessage: Ibi bikuraho ubutumwa AI bwabitswe kuri iki gikoresho.
history.title: amateka y'ikiyago
history.subtitle: AI ubutumwa bujana bwabitswe kuri iki gikoresho.
history.emptyMessage: Ibiyago vyawe AI vy'abagenzi bizoboneka hano inyuma y'uguhamagara kwawe kwa mbere.
history.loadFailed: Ntitwashoboye gushiramwo amateka y'ibiyago. Ndagusavye wongere ugerageze.
history.clearFailed: Ntitwashoboye gukuraho amateka y’ibiyago. Ndagusavye wongere ugerageze.
history.deleteFailed: Ntitwashoboye gufuta ico kiganiro. Ndagusavye wongere ugerageze.

voices.title: Amajwi yanje y'umutekano
voices.subtitle: Hitamwo ijwi ry’umugenzi wumva ko ribereye kwumva.
voices.sampleFailedMessage: Iki kigereranyo c'ijwi nticashoboye kuvuzwa. Ndagusavye wongere ugerageze.

settings.offlineModeSubtitle: Koresha inyishu z'abagenzi zifatanye iyo urubuga canke Hume ivyemezo bitaboneka.
settings.privacyBody: Sohora hanze canke gukuraho amakuru yo mu karere abitswe kuri iki gikoresho.
settings.deleteAll: Gukuraho amakuru yose yo mu karere
settings.emergencyContacts: Abo bashobora guhamagara mu gihe c'ivyihutirwa
settings.exportFailedMessage: Ntibishobora kwohereza hanze amakuru yawe ubu.
settings.deleteConfirmTitle: Gukuraho amakuru yose yo mu karere?
settings.deleteConfirmMessage: Ibi bikuraho umwirondoro wawe, amagenamiterere, abo ushobora guhamagara mu gihe c'ivyago, amateka y'ibiyago, ivyibutsa vy'uruhusha, n'igihe c'ukwemeza co mu karere kuri iki gikoresho.
settings.deleteFailedMessage: Ntibishobora gukuraho amakuru yo mu karere ubu.

sections.companionSubtitle: Ijwi n'ivyo ukunda bitari kuri interineti

settings.updateFailedMessage: Ntitwashoboye kubika ivyo dukunda. Ndagusavye wongere ugerageze.
settings.signOutFailedMessage: Ikiganiro cawe kiracariko kirakora. Ndagusavye wongere ugerageze.

contacts.title: Abo bashobora guhamagara mu gihe c'ivyago
contacts.subtitle: Abantu bizigira baboneka mu gihe c’imigenderanire y’umutekano.
contacts.name: Izina
contacts.emptyMessage: Wongerako umuntu wizigira kugira ngo abe yiteguye igihe umuvuduko w’umutekano ubakeneye.
contacts.removeMessage: Uyu muntu ntazosubira kugaragara mu nzira yawe y’ivyihutirwa.
contacts.saveFailedMessage: Ntitwashoboye kubika iyi nkuru. Suzuma ido n’ido maze wongere ugerageze.
contacts.removeFailedMessage: Ntitwashoboye gukuraho iyi nkuru. Ndagusavye wongere ugerageze.

friends.title: Ncuti
friends.subtitle: Abarinzi, ibisabwa, n’igishushanyo c’ivyihutirwa.
friends.emptyMessage: Abagenzi n’abacungezi bizigirwa bazoboneka hano bamaze kwongerwako.

emergency.title: Ivyihutirwa SOS
emergency.subtitle: Gutera imbere gusa igihe ukeneye gufashwa ubwo nyene.
emergency.body: Ivyo bizomenyesha urugendo rwawe rw’umutekano no gutegura abo wohamagara mu gihe c’ivyago.
emergency.addContact: Ongera umuntu wo guhamagara vyihutirwa mu Mitunganyirize.
emergency.quickShareMessage: Ikiganiro co gusangira ahantu kirateguwe. Huza iherezo ry'ugusangira inyuma kugira ngo wohereze amahuza y'ubuzima.

quickShare.title: Gusangira vyihuse
quickShare.subtitle: Ikibanza co gusangira uruja n’uruza rwateguwe.

capybearTap.title: Capybear kanda
capybearTap.subtitle: Kanda kabiri kuri NorthStar yawe kugira ngo utere umuceri w'umutekano.
capybearTap.body: Inzira y'ibimenyetso iriteguye ku bijanye n'ugushiramwo amawaya y'ibintu vya BLE.

errors.voiceOffline: Usa n'uwutari mu murongo. Ubutumwa bwawe buzorungikwa iyo usubiye kwifatanya.
errors.voiceQueued: Ubutumwa bwabitswe. Bizorungikwa igihe uwo mugenzi w’ijwi azosubira gufatanya.
errors.microphone: Ugukoresha mikoro birakenewe kugira ngo umuntu ahamagare n’ijwi. Ushobora kuyifungura mu Mitunganyirize, canke ukandika ubutumwa aho kuyikoresha.
errors.billing: Ijwi ryo kuri interineti ntiriboneka mu gihe gito. Ushobora kubandanya n’uwo mugenzi atari mu nzira.
errors.authentication: Umugenzi w'ijwi ntiyashoboye kugenzura iki kiganiro. Subira winjire canke ukoreshe umugenzi atari mu murongo ubu.
errors.timeout: Uwo mugenzi w’ijwi yatwaye igihe kirekire cane kugira ngo yishure. Suzuma uko uhuye maze wongere ugerageze.
errors.network: Ntitwashoboye gushikira uwo mugenzi w’ijwi. Suzuma ko uhuye, hanyuma wongere ugerageze canke ukomeze utari kuri internet.
errors.genericVoice: Hari ikintu cacitse ijwi ry’uguhamagara. Gerageza kandi, canke ukomeze n'uwo mugenzi atari kuri interineti.

ios.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: VeryLoving ikeneye gukoresha mikoro kugira ngo ibe nziza kandi AI ihamagara abagenzi.
ios.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: VeryLoving ikoresha aho uri ku ikarita y’umutekano n’ibintu vy’umutekano biri hafi.
ios.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: VeryLoving ikoresha Bluetooth kugira ngo ihuze n'amabuye yawe y'agaciro NorthStar.

releaseCritical.authUnavailable: Ubu buryo bwo kwinjira ntibuboneka muri iri verisiyo.
releaseCritical.demoModeNotice: Uburyo bw'igerageza bukoresha amakuru y'ibinyoma abitswe kuri iki gikoresho gusa. Serivisi zihujwe ntizemejwe, kandi iki gihe co gukoresha gisubira ku ntango iyo porogarama isubiye gufungurwa.
releaseCritical.authCodeInvalid: Kode yo kwemeza si yo canke yararengeje igihe. Saba kode nshasha wongere ugerageze.
releaseCritical.authRateLimited: Wagerageje kwinjira incuro nyinshi. Rindira gato, wongere ugerageze.
releaseCritical.authTimeout: Kwemeza ko winjiye vyatevye cane. Suzuma urubuga wongere ugerageze.
releaseCritical.authNetwork: Ntitwashoboye gushikira serivisi yo kwinjira. Suzuma urubuga wongere ugerageze.
releaseCritical.authSessionExpired: Igihe cawe co gukoresha carangiye. Subira winjire.
releaseCritical.mapUnavailable: Ikarata y'umutekano ntiyashoboye gufunguka. Suzuma urubuga wongere ugerageze.
releaseCritical.mapCachedLocation: Aho uri ubu ntihaboneka. Turiko twerekana aho uheruka kubika kuva %{capturedAt}.
releaseCritical.locationShareFailed: Ntitwashoboye gusangiza aho uri. Suzuma uruhusha rwo kumenya aho uri wongere ugerageze.
releaseCritical.locationShareCurrent: Aha ni ho ndi, handitswe kuri %{capturedAt}:
releaseCritical.locationShareCached: Aha ni ho mperuka kubika, handitswe kuri %{capturedAt}:
releaseCritical.blePermission: Uruhusha rwa Bluetooth rurazimije. Rucane muri Settings, wongere ugerageze.
releaseCritical.bleUnavailable: Guhuza na Bluetooth ntibishoboka kuri iki gikoresho canke muri iri verisiyo.
releaseCritical.bleScanFailed: Ntitwashoboye kubona NorthStar. Yigumize hafi, suzuma Bluetooth, wongere ugerageze.
releaseCritical.bleNoDevices: Nta bikoresho vya NorthStar biri hafi vyabonetse. Yigumize hafi wongere urondere.
releaseCritical.bleConnectFailed: Ntitwashoboye kwihuza na NorthStar. Yigumize ifise umuriro kandi iri hafi, wongere ugerageze.
releaseCritical.savePlaceFailed: Ntitwashoboye kubika aha hantu. Subira ugerageze.
releaseCritical.sosDialerOpened: Aho guhamagara kuri telefone harafungutse; umuhamagaro ntiwemejwe.
releaseCritical.sosContactRequired: Nta muntu wo gutabaza yabonetse; nta muhamagaro wabaye.
releaseCritical.sosDialerFailed: Aho guhamagara kuri telefone ntihashoboye gufunguka; nta muhamagaro wabaye.
releaseCritical.sosUnknown: Igerageza rya nyuma rya SOS ntiryashoboye kwemezwa.
releaseCritical.voiceConfiguration: Umugenzi w'ijwi ntashobora gukoreshwa ubu. Subira ugerageze hanyuma canke ubandanye n'umugenzi adakoresha urubuga.

medicalProfile.title: Emergency medical profile
medicalProfile.subtitle: Information you choose to share during an SOS
medicalProfile.description: Keep this information current. VeryLoving attaches it only to a connected SOS after you enable sharing; it is not sent through the phone call itself.
medicalProfile.conditionsHint: Enter one per line or separate items with commas.
medicalProfile.allergiesHint: Enter one per line or separate items with commas.
medicalProfile.medicationsHint: Enter one per line: name | dose | instructions.
medicalProfile.emergencyNotesHint: Add details that may help your emergency contacts.
medicalProfile.shareLabel: Include this profile with connected SOS alerts
medicalProfile.shareHint: When enabled, reviewed details may be sent to your synchronized emergency flow.
medicalProfile.consentBody: Saving with sharing enabled records your consent and review time. You can turn sharing off or clear this profile at any time.
medicalProfile.saved: Medical profile saved and review time recorded.
medicalProfile.loadFailed: We could not load your medical profile. Try again.
medicalProfile.saveFailed: We could not save your medical profile. Check the entries and try again.
medicalProfile.clearFailed: We could not clear your medical profile. Try again.
medicalProfile.clearMessage: This removes the emergency medical information stored securely on this device.

medication.title: Medication reminders
medication.subtitle: Schedule home robot reminders and caregiver escalation.
medication.referenceHint: Use a short private schedule reference with letters, numbers, hyphens, or underscores.
medication.noRobot: Pair a home robot before adding medication reminders.
medication.escalationHint: Caregivers are alerted only if the reminder remains unacknowledged.
medication.saveFailed: We could not save this medication reminder. Check the entries and try again.
medication.loadFailed: We could not load medication reminders. Try again.
medication.acknowledgeFailed: We could not acknowledge this medication reminder. Try again.
